channel.title: oled on Rihards Kubilis
channel.description: Recent content in oled on Rihards Kubilis

item.title: Merry Christmas
item.description: I had some spare time before holidays and I decided to assemble a simple electronic greeting prototype and this is a result of me finding these free Christmas related icons, so I created a thresholded bitmaps of these images and converted them to hex arrays using bitmap converter program. In video above you can see 0.96” OLED display hooked up with jumper wires to Attiny85 microcontroller on breadboard, here I am using ssd1306xled library drivers to display images on screen, ssd1306xled is provided provided by - The Tinusaur Project.
